sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Remove the 4 horizontal gray bars at row 33 on the right side
# These are at cols 38-40, 43-45, 48-50, 53-55
# Click center of each: (33, 39), (33, 44), (33, 49), (33, 54)

actions = [
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 33, 'col': 39},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 33, 'col': 44},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 33, 'col': 49},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 33, 'col': 54},
]

for a in actions:
    result = action([a])
    print(f"Clicked {a}: level_completed={result.get('level_completed')}, done={result.get('done')}")
    if result.get('level_completed') or result.get('done'):
        break

# Check result
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print(f"\nStep: {current_frame.step}, Level: {current_frame.level}")
print("\nRight side row 33 after:")
print(f"  {ascii_lines[33][35:58]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
